info.title: CRW REST API
info.description: Firecrawl-compatible web scraping, crawling, mapping, search, and extraction API. Hosted at https://api.fastcrw.com; self-host with `docker run -p 3000:3000 ghcr.io/us/crw:latest`.

tags.name: search
tags.description: Web search via SearXNG (self-hosted) or managed (hosted)

tags.name: extract
tags.description: Structured JSON extraction via scrape + jsonOptions

tags.name: change-tracking
tags.description: Stateless diff of a scrape against a caller-supplied previous snapshot (monitor primitive)

post.summary: Search the web and optionally scrape results

get.summary: Get crawl job status and results

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Crawl job id returned by POST /v1/crawl

post.summary: Diff current scrape content against a previous snapshot
post.description: Stateless: opencore stores nothing — the caller supplies the `previous` snapshot. Accepts a single body or a `batch` array (presence of `batch` selects batch mode). The crawl-path workhorse for monitors.

200.description: Diff result (object for single, array for batch) wrapped in the standard envelope

get.description: Returns which LLM providers, output formats, search features, and document parsers this opencore instance supports. SaaS frontends call this on boot to decide which options to surface.

200.description: Capability report for this opencore instance

serverKeyConfigured.description: True when a server-side LLM API key is present; false for BYOK-only deployments

maxConcurrency.description: Server-configured LLM fan-out cap; 0 when no server LLM config is present

requireByokHeader.description: Header name required on LLM-touching requests; omitted when no header guard is configured

post.summary: Start an async multi-URL structured extraction job
post.description: Native extraction. Returns a per-URL array via GET /v1/extract/{id}. At least one of `prompt` or `schema` is required.

get.summary: Get extract job status and per-URL results

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Extract job id returned by POST /v1/extract

bearerAuth.description: Hosted only. Get a key at https://fastcrw.com/register.

description.description: Alias of snippet (same value, kept for Firecrawl response-shape parity)

onlyMainContent.description: Strip navigation, ads, and boilerplate; keep main article content only

renderJs.description: null = auto-detect, true = force JS rendering, false = skip JS rendering

waitFor.description: Milliseconds to wait after JS rendering before extracting content

includeTags.description: CSS selectors / HTML tags to include in extraction

excludeTags.description: CSS selectors / HTML tags to remove before extraction

jsonSchema.description: JSON Schema describing the structured output shape for the 'json' format

headers.description: Custom HTTP request headers forwarded to the target URL

cssSelector.description: CSS selector to narrow content extraction to a specific element

xpath.description: XPath expression to narrow content extraction to a specific element

chunkStrategy.description: Strategy for chunking the extracted markdown

query.description: Query string for BM25/cosine chunk filtering (used with chunkStrategy)

filterMode.description: Filtering algorithm to rank chunks against query

topK.description: Number of top chunks to return after filtering (default: 5)

proxy.description: Per-request proxy URL (http/https/socks5). Overrides global config.

proxyList.description: Per-request proxy pool to rotate among (BYOP). Takes precedence over proxy and server config.

country.description: 2-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for residential proxy egress (e.g. 'us', 'gb')

stealth.description: Override stealth mode for this request (null = use global config)

actions.description: Unsupported Firecrawl parameter — returns a clear error if supplied

llmApiKey.description: BYOK: LLM provider API key for structured extraction (overrides server key)

baseUrl.description: Per-request LLM base URL override for OpenAI-compatible providers (e.g. https://api.deepseek.com/v1)

summaryPrompt.description: User-supplied instructions appended to the summary system prompt (capped at 500 chars)

maxContentChars.description: Maximum bytes of scraped content sent to LLM for 'summary' format (capped at 200 KB)

renderer.description: Pin this request to a specific renderer. Non-auto implies renderJs:true unless renderJs:false is set.

deadlineMs.description: End-to-end deadline budget in milliseconds (default: 8000, max: 60000)

debug.description: When true, response includes debugExtraction trace with every candidate the extractor considered

changeTracking.description: Activated when formats includes 'changeTracking'. The format entry is the plain string; options ride on this sibling field.

goal.description: Plain-language monitor goal for the meaningful-change judge

judgeEnabled.description: Run the LLM meaningful-change judge on a changed page (requires goal)

parsers.description: Document parser directives. Omit = auto-parse PDFs. Empty array = disable parsing.

schema.description: JSON schema for the extracted shape

maxDepth.description: Maximum link-follow depth from the start URL

crawlFallback.description: Fall back to BFS crawl when sitemap is missing or sparse

ExtractRequest.description: At least one of `prompt` or `schema` must be present.

schema.description: JSON Schema constraining the extracted output.

basis.description: Per-field attribution (Phase 2b). Rejected with 400 while unsupported.

modes.description: Diff surfaces. gitDiff = markdown unified diff + AST; json = per-field diff; both = mixed.

schema.description: JSON schema of tracked fields (json/mixed mode)

tag.description: Opaque caller tag echoed on the result

contentType.description: MIME type; non-text content is hashed, not diffed

contentHash.description: Mode-aware hash; persist + supply on the next check

json.description: Parse-diff AST (gitDiff-only) OR per-field path map {previous,current} (json/mixed)

status.description: Per-page status. Set-level new/removed are computed by the caller's reconciler.

firstObservation.description: True when no previous was supplied — caller maps to 'new'

ChangeTrackingDiffRequest.description: Single body (provide 'current') OR batch (provide 'batch'). Top-level modes/schema/prompt/contentType act as shared defaults in batch mode.

ChunkStrategy.description: Strategy for chunking extracted markdown before query-based filtering

type.description: Chunking algorithm: sentence = split on .!?, regex = split on pattern, topic = split on markdown headings

maxChars.description: Maximum characters per chunk (merges short chunks up to this limit)

pattern.description: Regex pattern to split on (required when type = 'regex')

schema.description: JSON Schema for structured extraction. Used as jsonSchema when jsonSchema is not set directly.

ParserSpec.description: Document parser directive. Accepts string form ('pdf') or object form.

mode.description: Parsing strategy (auto = text-first; ocr degrades to text extraction with a warning)

maxPages.description: Optional cap on the number of pages to parse

urls.description: Count of URLs enqueued for fetch (preflight-failed URLs appear in results, not here).

data.description: Extracted JSON object (present when status is completed).

results.description: Per-URL results in original request order.

error.description: Job-level error, set only when every URL failed.

Unauthorized.description: Missing or invalid bearer token (hosted only)

SearchDisabled.description: Search is disabled in self-hosted config (error: search_disabled)
